pi_items.source: Task description line 4: 'Save the flipchart as /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/civil_rights_timeline.flipchart'
Task description line 4: save location specifies /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts
Task description line 4: explicitly states full path
Task description line 1: 'Create a new flipchart with exactly 2 pages.'
Task description line 2 specifies title 'Civil Rights Movement Timeline' which contains both terms

Task description lines 4-5 enumerate exactly these 5 events: Brown v. Board of Education (1954), Montgomery Bus Boycott (1955), March on Washington (1963), Civil Rights Act (1964), Voting Rights Act (1965)
Task description line 3: 'Add at least 5 shape markers (circles or rectangles) along the line.'
Task description line 2: 'Draw a horizontal line across the page to serve as the timeline axis.'

privileged_info_summary: The Civil Rights Movement Timeline task requires creation of a 2-page ActivInspire flipchart to be saved at /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/civil_rights_timeline.flipchart. Page 1 must contain title 'Civil Rights Movement Timeline' with subtitle '1954-1968'. Page 2 must display a horizontal timeline axis with at least 5 shape markers (circles or rectangles) labeled with: Brown v. Board of Education (1954), Montgomery Bus Boycott (1955), March on Washington (1963), Civil Rights Act (1964), and Voting Rights Act (1965). All 8 metadata claims have been verified as accurate against the task description.
